findings.title: Password Manager Server-Side Vault Theft Research
findings.summary: Researchers demonstrated server operators can steal entire vaults when account recovery or vault sharing is enabled; attacks weaken encryption to convert ciphertext to plaintext.

findings.title: Vanta Diagnostics Breach — 140K Affected (Everest Ransomware)
findings.summary: Everest ransomware group breached healthcare diagnostics firm affecting 140,000 individuals.

findings.title: BeyondTrust CVE-2026-1731 — Full Exploit Analysis by Rapid7
findings.affected_technology: BeyondTrust Remote Support and Privileged Remote Access
findings.summary: Rapid7 published detailed technical analysis showing vulnerability in same endpoint as CVE-2024-12356; unauth command injection via WebSocket, patch adds numeric input validation.

findings.title: CISA KEV — SolarWinds WHD, Notepad++, TeamT5 Entries
findings.affected_technology: SolarWinds Web Help Desk, Notepad++, TeamT5 ThreatSonar
findings.summary: Three additional KEV entries from Feb 12-17 now cataloged: SolarWinds WHD auth bypass (deadline passed), Notepad++ update integrity bypass, TeamT5 file upload.

noted.summary: ESET guidance on detecting AI deepfake voice calls targeting businesses.
Retirement warning from Datadog; orgs should plan migration.
Amazon Ring cancels partnership with surveillance-tech company Flock.
